title: Chalmaar Lyrics Devi(l) Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Devi(l) Chalmaar Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Benny Dayal
Chalmaar!!

paththu mani vaakkula
pachchayappaa's raodula
short skirtkorr jennifer

adithadi nadakkala
vettu kuththu vilugala
azhagula paakkuraa jennifer

chellame thangame
mellamaa paaradi
seththu kiththu povendi

nee sari sari nu
orumura sonnaa
sathiya polappendi

appappaa hippula
summeru winter thaan
bend it like beckkam baby
Chalmaar!!

love feel kannil irukku
no ball penne edharku
namma kadhalukku naduvula
screen edharku

life-il tension edharku
lighta siri enakku
andha sirippula thaane
sorgam irukku

loveula vilundhu
loveula ezhundhu
marupadi viluvomaa

adi penne penne va
lovers aagi
vaanathil parappomaa

appappaa hippula
summeru winter thaan
bend it like beckkam baby
Chalmaar!!

krishna endhan peruthaan
vaadaa flower naanthaan
en brindhavan thottathukku
queen neethaan

kiss me single naanthan
touch me mingle aavom
en thananthani desertula
rain neethaan

full moon naduvula
rainbow pola azhagaa
irukkuriye

tea kada boiler pol
en nenjil soodaa
kodhikkiriye

appappaa hippula
summeru winter thaan
bend it like beckkam baby
Chalmaar!!

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Chalmaar?

The song Chalmaar is a lively dance track that celebrates fun and flirtation, featuring playful lyrics that capture the essence of youthful exuberance.

What is the context of Chalmaar in the movie Devi(l)?

In Devi(l), Chalmaar is performed during a vibrant party scene, highlighting the carefree spirit of the characters and their interactions.

Who is the singer of Chalmaar?

The song is sung by the talented Benny Dayal, known for his energetic performances and versatile singing style.

When was Chalmaar released?

Chalmaar was released on September 27, 2016, as part of the movie Devi(l).
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Chalmaar from Devi(l) is a high-energy dance number that perfectly encapsulates the fun and flirtation of youth. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, it invites listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The vibrant performance by Benny Dayal adds to the song's lively atmosphere, making it a perfect fit for celebrations and parties. Overall, the song conveys a sense of joy and excitement, resonating with anyone looking to have a good time.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chalmaar from Devi(l) is an electrifying dance number that showcases the vibrant energy of Benny Dayal's vocals. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the fun and excitement that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: In the ten gem words, on the road, there's Jennifer in a short skirt.
She walks with style, showing off her beauty, that's Jennifer.
Darling, slowly look at me, I want to go with you.
If you say it's right, it's like a promise, my friend.
Oh my, in summer and winter, bend it like Beckham, baby.
Love is in the eyes, no ballpoint pen needed, what's the screen for our love?
In life, what's the tension for? Lighten up, my smile is heaven.
Shall we rise from love and fall back into love again?
Oh girl, shall we spread our love in the sky?
Oh my, in summer and winter, bend it like Beckham, baby.
Krishna is my name, I'm the flower, you're the queen of my Brindavan garden.
Kiss me single, let's mingle, you're the rain in my desert.
Like a full moon, you shine beautifully like a rainbow.
My heart is boiling like a tea shop's boiler.
Oh my, in summer and winter, bend it like Beckham, baby.
